testcase.name: Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › sv index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › da index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › no index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › fi index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › de index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › fr index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › es index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › nl index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › ar index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › he index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › ja index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › ko index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Multi-language index accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) › zh index page should be WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
Accessibility › homepage should be accessible
Accessibility › article page should be accessible
Accessibility › should have proper heading hierarchy
Accessibility › should have alt text for images
Accessibility › should be keyboard navigable
Accessibility › should activate links with Enter key
Accessibility › should have sufficient color contrast
Accessibility › should have proper ARIA landmarks
Accessibility › should have proper link text
Accessibility › should have skip navigation link
Accessibility › should have proper page title
Accessibility › should have language attribute
Accessibility › should support text zoom
Accessibility › should have proper form labels if forms exist
Homepage › should load successfully
Homepage › should display navigation menu
Homepage › should display recent articles
Homepage › should have working sitemap link
Homepage › should have proper HTML structure
Homepage › should have SEO meta tags
Multi-Language Support › should load English version
Multi-Language Support › should load German version
Multi-Language Support › should load French version
Multi-Language Support › should load Spanish version
Multi-Language Support › should load Swedish version
Multi-Language Support › should load Danish version
Multi-Language Support › should load Norwegian version
Multi-Language Support › should load Finnish version
Multi-Language Support › should load Dutch version
Multi-Language Support › should load Arabic version with RTL direction
Multi-Language Support › should load Hebrew version with RTL direction
Multi-Language Support › should load Japanese version
Multi-Language Support › should load Korean version
Multi-Language Support › should load Chinese version
Multi-Language Support › should switch between languages
Multi-Language Support › should have consistent structure across languages
Multi-Language Support › should have language-specific meta tags
Multi-Language Support › should maintain navigation in selected language
Multi-Language Support › should have proper charset encoding for all languages
Multi-Language Support › should display articles in language-specific format
Multi-Language Support › should have correct language in alternate links
Navigation › should have functional navigation menu
Navigation › should navigate to different sections
Navigation › should maintain navigation state across pages
Navigation › should have working home link
Navigation › should support browser back button
Navigation › should support browser forward button
Navigation › should have accessible skip links
Navigation › should have proper link focus states
Navigation › should have working external links
Navigation › should not have broken internal links
News Browsing › should open and display article
News Browsing › should navigate back to homepage
News Browsing › should display article metadata
News Browsing › should have working internal links
News Browsing › should display article content
Responsive Design › should render correctly on Mobile Portrait
Responsive Design › should render correctly on Tablet Portrait
Responsive Design › should render correctly on Desktop
Responsive Design › should have responsive meta viewport tag
Responsive Design › should adapt layout for different screen sizes
Responsive Design › should have touch-friendly tap targets on mobile
Responsive Design › should not have horizontal scroll on mobile
Responsive Design › should display readable text on mobile
Responsive Design › should stack content on mobile
Responsive Design › should maintain functionality across viewports
Responsive Design › should have responsive images
Responsive Design › should hide or show elements based on viewport
Responsive Design › should support landscape orientation on mobile
Responsive Design › should have readable line lengths on desktop
Responsive Design › should support text resizing without breaking layout
RSS Feed › should load rss.xml successfully
RSS Feed › should be valid RSS 2.0 with required root element
RSS Feed › should have required channel metadata
RSS Feed › should declare Dublin Core namespace for language tags
RSS Feed › should have at least one item
RSS Feed › should have items with required elements
RSS Feed › should include dc:language tags on items
RSS Feed › should contain articles in multiple languages
RSS Feed › should have atom self-link with correct URL
RSS Feed › should have lastBuildDate element
Article SEO Metadata › should have Open Graph title
Article SEO Metadata › should have Open Graph description
Article SEO Metadata › should have Open Graph type set to article
Article SEO Metadata › should have Open Graph locale
Article SEO Metadata › should have Open Graph site_name
Article SEO Metadata › should have Twitter Card meta tag
Article SEO Metadata › should have Twitter title
Article SEO Metadata › should have Twitter description
Article SEO Metadata › should have meta description
Article SEO Metadata › should have meta keywords
Article SEO Metadata › should have meta author
Article SEO Metadata › should have Schema.org JSON-LD structured data
Article SEO Metadata › should have page title with site name
Article SEO Metadata › should have charset UTF-8
Article SEO Metadata › should have viewport meta tag
Article SEO Metadata › article page should be accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA)
Multi-Language Article SEO › en article should have correct og:locale
Multi-Language Article SEO › en article should have html lang attribute
Multi-Language Article SEO › de article should have correct og:locale
Multi-Language Article SEO › de article should have html lang attribute
Multi-Language Article SEO › fr article should have correct og:locale
Multi-Language Article SEO › fr article should have html lang attribute
Multi-Language Article SEO › ar article should have correct og:locale
Multi-Language Article SEO › ar article should have html lang attribute
Multi-Language Article SEO › Arabic article should have RTL direction
Multi-Language Article SEO › Hebrew article should have RTL direction
Sitemap XML › should load sitemap.xml when available
Sitemap XML › should have valid urlset structure
Sitemap XML › should contain article URLs
Sitemap XML › should contain more than 50 URLs
Sitemap XML › should include rss.xml in sitemap
Sitemap HTML Pages › English sitemap HTML should load successfully
Sitemap HTML Pages › English sitemap HTML should have article links
Sitemap HTML Pages › English sitemap HTML should have language navigation
Sitemap HTML Pages › English sitemap HTML should be accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA)
Sitemap HTML Pages › all 14 language sitemap HTML pages should load
Sitemap HTML Pages › language sitemap pages should have correct lang attribute
Sitemap HTML Pages › Arabic sitemap should have RTL direction
Sitemap HTML Pages › Hebrew sitemap should have RTL direction
